name: John McChesney TenEyck Jr.
title: CIO / CTO | Enterprise Technology Executive | Financial Services, Architecture, Infrastructure and Operations
bio: Enterprise technology executive with 25+ years leading architecture, infrastructure, shared services, operations, and large-scale transformation in regulated global environments. Most recently led a 2,500-person engineering, infrastructure, and IT business services organization with $800M budget responsibility and oversight of $100M in annual IT projects.
availability: Open to senior CIO, CTO, and enterprise technology leadership conversations.
certifications: Quality assurance leadership and enterprise transformation experience
